description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the th0br0/iota-buildenv:latest Docker image and sets the GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY variable to recursive. Define a single stage named test. Add a test32 job in the test stage that runs the shell command tools/ci/build.sh 32. Add a test64 job in the test stage that runs the shell command tools/ci/build.sh 64. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
